author: jaytbarimbao-collab
title: Static-detector + LLM depth miner
notes: Self-contained stdlib agent. Combines generic (non-project-specific) static detectors for common high/critical vulnerability classes (missing access control, unprotected initializer, reentrancy, unchecked low-level call, unsafe delegatecall, tx.origin auth, unprotected selfdestruct) with up to 3 budgeted LLM depth/breadth passes. Emits matcher-shaped findings; degrades gracefully on 429/errors.
